patch.value: findDuplicateIssueCodes must skip any item with a non-empty duplicate_of (already adjudicated). Thread duplicate_of into IssueCodeItem.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Added 2 GH-278 unit tests to tests/unit/core/governance/issue-codes.spec.ts: (1) item with non-empty duplicate_of is excluded before grouping so its shared code no longer collides (group drops to 1, returns []); (2) duplicate_of as empty string / whitespace-only string is NOT excluded (isNonEmptyIdReference false) so both items still contribute and the code is flagged. Also covered by the mixed-group test (closed-dup excluded alongside parent/child collapse). All 19 tests pass; scoped vitest coverage of src/core/governance/issue-codes.ts = 100% (42/42 stmts, 26/26 branch, 10/10 funcs, 37/37 lines).

patch.value: GH-278 fixed: findDuplicateIssueCodes excludes items with non-empty duplicate_of before grouping; covered by issue-codes tests.
